name: diff2html

en.when_to_use: Use it instead of a hand-written table when you need to render a unified/git diff as a GitHub-style line-by-line or side-by-side comparison with a file list, line numbers, and word-level highlighting, because native AI implementations inevitably fail on pairing lines in long files, aligning two columns, and word-level differences.
en.why_valuable: AI defaults can only hand-write a roughly 60-70% usable two-color table for a short diff; they cannot reliably pair lines in long files, align line numbers across columns, or highlight word-level changes. diff2html closes the loop with both the parsing algorithm and HTML rendering.

data_in.note: The primary input is one complete unified/git diff string; the other fields only modify the output form of upstream html(diff, config). The library escapes diff content, and the consumer places the returned library-generated HTML into a dedicated container.

schema.diff: string -- unified/git diff text including file headers and @@ hunks
schema.drawFileList?: boolean -- whether to render the file list

spec.note: The output contains wide tables and code lines; set the container to an explicit 480px height with overflow:auto so long diffs do not overrun the host. Iron rule 3 forbids vh and percentage heights. side-by-side may scroll horizontally in narrow containers.

when_to_use: 需要把 unified/git diff 渲成 GitHub 风格的 line-by-line 或 side-by-side 对照、文件列表、行号与词级高亮时用它而非手写表格,因为 AI 原生手写在长文件行配对、双栏对齐和词级差异上必然失败。
why_valuable: AI 默认只能把短 diff 手写成约 60-70% 可用的双色表格,做不到长文件稳定行配对、双栏行号对齐和词级高亮;diff2html 把解析算法与 HTML 渲染一次闭环。

data_in.note: 主输入是一个完整 unified/git diff 文本;其余字段只修饰上游 html(diff, config) 的输出形态。库会转义 diff 内容,消费侧把返回的库生成 HTML 放入专用容器。

schema.diff: string —— unified/git diff 文本,含文件头与 @@ hunk
schema.drawFileList?: boolean —— 是否绘制文件列表

spec.note: 输出含宽表格与代码行,容器显式设 480px 高并 overflow:auto,避免长 diff 撑爆宿主;铁律 3 禁 vh/百分比高。side-by-side 在窄容器内允许横向滚动。

example._why: 表格型高歧义组件:输出布局、文件列表与行匹配选项组合后,最小 unified diff fixture 能让 AI 一次拼对。

minimal.diff:
diff --git a/greet.js b/greet.js
index 3b18e13..43b18e1 100644
--- a/greet.js
+++ b/greet.js
@@ -1 +1 @@
-console.log('hello');
+console.log('hello, world');

carriers.widget: conditional:ESM 与 pinned CSS/font 需可访问 jsDelivr;link 和渲染容器均挂入 shadowRoot,无 document.head 注入
carriers.codex: supported:ESM CDN + 静态 HTML/CSS,无 canvas/worker/wasm/uplink 需求
